why.zh: 把避稅、境外財富與跨國企業資料直接連到可檢驗的研究問題；優先查資料頁與方法說明。
why.en: Links avoidance, offshore wealth, and multinational-enterprise evidence to testable questions; start with data and methodology notes.

why.zh: 追蹤政策形成前的分析與方法；新文出現時，先記下問題、資料與可反駁的假設。
why.en: Tracks analysis and methods before policy settles; record the question, data, and falsifiable hypothesis when a new paper appears.

why.zh: 用短篇專業評論捕捉尚未沉澱成論文的爭點；文章只作為問題線索，回到一手法源核實。
why.en: Uses concise expert commentary to catch unsettled issues; treat posts as leads and verify through primary materials.

why.zh: 追蹤規則、執行工具、資料庫與新文件的正式版本；所有法律或制度主張以此類官方材料為準。
why.en: Tracks official versions of rules, implementation tools, databases, and new documents; use these materials for legal and institutional claims.

why.zh: 補足 OECD 視角以外的協定與行政實務；特別適合追蹤來源地課稅與發展中國家立場。
why.en: Adds treaty and administrative perspectives beyond the OECD, especially source taxation and developing-country positions.

why.zh: 把尚在形成中的歐盟稅制爭點提早放進問題庫；同時保留諮詢文件、回應與影響評估。
why.en: Brings emerging EU tax issues into the question bank early; retain consultation papers, responses, and impact assessments.

why.zh: 用稅收能力與行政材料檢驗制度設計能否在不同國家條件下運作。
why.en: Tests whether institutional design can operate across differing tax-capacity and administrative conditions.

why.zh: 提供以稅務微觀資料研究遵從、企業與發展問題的實證入口。
why.en: Provides an empirical entry point for tax compliance, firms, and development using micro tax data.

label.en: OECD Taxation: Policy and Public Materials

why.zh: 把公開徵詢與新興議題當作研究題目的早期訊號，不把它們誤當成既定規則。
why.en: Uses consultations and emerging issues as early research signals, not as settled law.

label.en: SSRN: Tax Law and Law & Economics

why.zh: 用於發現尚未刊出的論證與作者網絡；下載或引用前另核對版本與出版狀態。
why.en: Finds unpublished arguments and author networks; confirm version and publication status before downloading or citing.
